channel.title: Fireworks AI
channel.description: Fireworks AI — synthesized feed by ai-news-spider

item.title: Frontier AI at a fraction of the cost: open-source worker agents with a closed
item.description: Boost your agentic AI performance while slashing costs with a hybrid "worker-advisor" architecture. Our latest research at Fireworks AI demonstrates that coupling an open-source worker model (like Kimi-K2.6 or GLM-5.2) with a "read-only" frontier model reviewer (Claude Opus 4.8) consistently lifts resolve rates across diverse benchmarks, including SWE-bench Pro, Terminal-Bench 2.1, and the Legal Agent Benchmark.
